title: Nueva York se prepara para  ser la capital mundial del fútbol
summary: La final del Mundial de fútbol entre España y Argentina de este domingo abarrota una ciudad que prevé 3.000 millones de caja. Leer

title: El apoyo de 15 patronales acerca la reelección de Garamendi en CEOE: amarra un 40% de votos
summary: El respaldo de las grandes organizaciones empresariales garantiza al actual presidente más del 40% de los votos, antes incluso de que se cierre el plazo para formalizar candidaturas alternativas. Leer

title: Infraestructuras: las empresas españolas brillan en el mundo
summary: A pesar del buen momento de las compañías españolas a nivel internacional, es necesario recuperar en nuestro país el modelo de concesiones, donde colaboren entidades públicas y privadas. Leer

title: La Cámara de Barcelona aprueba dividida ampliar las 'sillas de plata'
summary: El presidente saca adelante la reforma con su voto de calidad tras el empate en el pleno. La entidad fija en diez las vocalías para grandes empresas con aportaciones voluntarias. Leer

title: EU launches legal action against 17 member states over new single permit rules
summary: The European Commission this week launched legal action against 17 member states over the application of the new directive on the single permit, a combined procedure that grants third country nationals both a work and residence permit instead of applying separately for them.

title: At least 12,000 excess deaths in Europe's June heatwave
summary: At least 12,000 excess deaths were recorded across nine European countries during June's heatwave, national statistics indicated, a toll that could yet rise as more data is released, according to an AFP analysis.

title: Regulator backs extension of Spain's largest nuclear plant
summary: Spain's nuclear safety regulator on Thursday backed extending the operating life of the country's largest atomic power plant to 2030, beyond the government's planned 2028 shutdown.

title: Corruption trial for Spain PM's wife to go ahead following brother's conviction
summary: A Spanish court on Thursday confirmed Prime Minister Pedro Sanchez's wife Begoña Gómez will face trial for alleged influence peddling and embezzlement, just days after a court banned the premier's brother from holding public office.

title: Spain back on wildfire alert as blaze hits northeast
summary: Spanish authorities on Thursday said a large wildfire in the northeast would take days to control, sparking fresh alarm a week after the country's deadliest such disaster in recent history.

title: What to know before installing an air-conditioner in your home in Spain
summary: It's becoming increasingly clear just how hot Spain can get during summer, and for many, pulling the shutters down or using a fan doesn't cut it. So what should homeowners and renters consider before thinking of installing an air-conditioner?

title: LISTED: The cities in Spain installing big screens for the World Cup final
summary: On Sunday July 19th, Spain will take on Argentina in the World Cup final. If you want to soak up the atmosphere and excitement outdoors, here's where to watch the match on a big screen near you.

title: Google accuses EU of undermining privacy of 'millions of Europeans'
summary: The European Union demanded Thursday that Google share data with other search engines and open up its Android system to rival AI services, but the US giant said the measures would put privacy at risk.

title: Valencia airport to undergo €400-million expansion
summary: Valencia airport is set to receive a €400-million expansion starting next year to help it deal with its increase in international passengers, with a special focus on non-Schengen travellers.
